---
title: "reporter.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\reporter.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 7
logic_score: 5.35
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 6.20
overall_score: 4.17
---

## Intent
The `reporter.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on SovereignReporter, __init__, render_hud, record_trace. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignReporter, __init__, render_hud, record_trace. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `SovereignReporter`
- `__init__`
- `render_hud`
- `record_trace`
